name: writing
description: Publication-prep tools for academic and public-facing writing: style (17 canonical English-prose rules + 18 page-cap additions + 2 audit-time rules), plot (matplotlib templates for paper figures with Google-brand palette and Palatino body), review (pre-submission self-review of AI/ML paper Overleaf drafts simulating NeurIPS/ICML/ICLR reviewers), and paper-overleaf (Overleaf-synced LaTeX paper editing with red-mark workflow, bilingual zh/en review, claim-evidence audit).

interface.shortDescription: Style, plotting, paper review and editing
interface.longDescription: Tools for academic and public-facing writing. Ported from the corresponding Claude Code plugin at github.com/wenhaochai/claude-plugins. Note: paper-overleaf is tuned for Claude Opus and gpt-5.5 may underperform on long-form paper editing tasks.
